properties.description: The ID of the document.
properties.name: documentId

properties.description: The title of the document.
properties.name: title

properties.description: Tabs that are part of a document.
The properties of the tab, like ID and title.
properties.name: tabProperties

properties.description: The ID of the tab.
properties.name: tabId

properties.description: The user-visible name of the tab.
properties.name: title

properties.description: The ID of the parent tab. Empty when the current tab is a root-level tab, which means it doesn't have any parents.
properties.name: parentTabId

properties.description: The zero-based index of the tab within the parent.
properties.name: index

properties.description: The depth of the tab within the document. Root-level tabs start at 0.
properties.name: nestingLevel

properties.description: The emoji icon displayed with the tab.
properties.name: iconEmoji

properties.description: The child tabs nested within this tab.
properties.name: childTabs
tabs

properties.name: revisionId

properties.description: The suggestions view mode applied to the document.
properties.name: suggestionsViewMode

properties.description: The main body of the document.

properties.description: The contents of the body.
The zero-based start index of this structural element, in UTF-16 code units.
properties.name: startIndex

properties.description: The zero-based end index of this structural element, exclusive, in UTF-16 code units.
properties.name: endIndex

properties.label: Template Document ID
properties.name: fileId

properties.label: Placeholder Format
properties.name: placeholderFormat

properties.description: Name of the new document.
properties.label: Title of New Document
properties.name: fileName

properties.label: Folder ID
properties.name: folderId

properties.description: Don't include the "[[]]", only the key name and its value.
properties.label: Variables
properties.name: values

description: Google Docs is a cloud-based collaborative word processing platform that allows multiple users to create, edit, and share documents in real-time.
name: googleDocs
title: Google Docs
